build.description: Default primary agent with full development access
build.prompt: Work in build mode. Implement, test, and complete the requested changes.

plan.description: Planning agent that asks before commands or file changes
plan.prompt: Work in plan mode. Analyze the problem and produce a clear plan before making changes.

general.description: General-purpose agent for researching and executing complex tasks
general.prompt: Complete the delegated task autonomously. Return one concise result to the parent.

explore.description: Fast read-focused agent for exploring codebases
explore.prompt: Explore the codebase without modifying it. Report findings with file references.
